name: autonomy-control
description: The enforcement bundle for partial-autonomy work: it ties together autonomy-slider (the policy — which level), permission-tiers (the settings.json mechanism), and commit-checkpoints (mid-work rollback), all referenced as standalone v4 skills, then adds the net-new piece — a PreToolUse hook on Edit|Write|MultiEdit that enforces the currently-declared autonomy level at tool-call time so an L0 (suggest-only) declaration mechanically blocks file writes instead of merely advising against them. tier: v4.
